response.title: Senior Software Engineer
response.description: Tech Innovators Inc. is seeking a highly skilled Senior Software Engineer to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience in software development, with a strong focus on building scalable applications. You will be responsible for designing and implementing robust software solutions, mentoring junior engineers, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to drive project success.

required_skills: Proficiency in Java and Python programming languages
Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS or Azure
Strong understanding of RESTful API design and development
Expertise in database management systems (e.g., PostgreSQL, MongoDB)
Familiarity with Agile methodologies and version control systems (Git)
Ability to write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
Experience in performance optimization and debugging of applications
preferred_skills: Experience with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices
Experience in mentoring and leading engineering teams
requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field
